payload.author: Bri
payload.body: CORRECTION for future agents: there is NO MCP server in this codebase (the workspace overview text mentioning 'scope mcp' / '23 MCP tools' is STALE). The agent-control surface is the CLI (--json on every command) + the HTTP REST API on the hub. Any spike or ticket that assumes an MCP transport should target CLI/HTTP instead. Surfaced while finishing SCP-128 (grep for modelcontextprotocol/registerTool returns nothing).
